name: BELLRING BRANDS, INC.
business: BellRing Brands sells convenient nutrition products, primarily ready-to-drink (RTD) protein shakes and protein powders, under the Premier Protein and Dymatize brands. Products are distributed across club, food/drug/mass, eCommerce, specialty, and convenience channels.

exposures.sentence: Our primary brands, Premier Protein and Dymatize , target a broad range of consumers and compete in all major product forms, including ready-to-drink (RTD) protein shakes and powders.
Our products are distributed across a diverse network of channels including club, food, drug and mass (FDM), eCommerce, specialty and convenience.
Technology failures, cybersecurity incidents and corruption of our data privacy protections could disrupt our operations and negatively impact our business.

catalysts.event: First Amendment to Credit Agreement executed, increasing revolving facility to $500 million and extending maturity to August 22, 2030
catalysts.sentence: On August 22, 2025, we entered into a First Amendment to the Credit Agreement (the Amendment ) which, among other matters, (i) increased the aggregate principal amount available under the Revolving Credit Facility to $500.0 million, (ii) extended the maturity date of the Revolving Credit Facility to August 22, 2030 provided that if on December 14, 2029, our 7.00% Senior Notes maturing in March 2030 have not been redeemed in full in cash or refinanced and replaced in full with notes and/or loans maturing at least 91 days after August 22, 2030, then the maturity date of the Revolving Credit Facility will be December 14, 2029

catalysts.event: Manufacturing agreement with third-party contract manufacturer for Premier Protein RTD shakes expires
Supply agreement with largest protein powder supplier expires
